{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Customer Relation Management & Retention Manager",
  "description": "Multipro Consumer Products Limited is the largest company in Nigeria dealing in Sales, Haulage and Logistics. MCPL was founded in 1996 as a fully owned company of the Tolaram Group. The first product sold by MCPL in 1996 was Indomie and since then it has played a seminal role in making Indomie a household brand in Nigeria. MCPL over the years has grown adding 13 brands in various categories comprising of Noodle, Snacks, Milk, Cereal, Oil, Homecare and Personal Hygiene.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Customer Relation Management &amp; Retention Manager&nbsp;
Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Role Purpose


	To drive repeat purchases and long-term customer loyalty through strategic lifecycle marketing, targeted retention campaigns, and well-structured loyalty programs.


Responsibilities


	Plan and execute multi-channel campaigns across email, SMS, and push notifications to engage and retain customers.
	Design and manage loyalty and reward programs that incentivize repeat purchases and deepen brand affinity.
	Segment customers based on behavior, purchase history, and lifecycle stage to deliver targeted and personalized campaigns.
	Track key customer lifecycle metrics, identify drop-off points, and implement strategies to improve retention and engagement.


KPI


	Repeat Purchase Rate
	Customer Lifetime Value (CLV)
	Retention Rate
	CRM-Driven Revenue
	Coupon Redemption Rate


Skills and Competencies:


	Proficiency in CRM platforms and marketing automation tools such as MoEngage, Braze, or HubSpot.
	Strong expertise in customer segmentation and lifecycle marketing strategies.
	Experience with A/B testing and data-driven campaign optimization.
	Analytical mindset with the ability to translate data insights into actionable marketing decisions.


Ideal Background:


	Minimum of 3 years of experience in CRM, lifecycle marketing, or retention marketing.
	Prior experience working with e-commerce or Direct-to-Consumer (D2C) brands.
	If you are passionate about building lasting customer relationships and driving measurable growth through data-led marketing, we would love to hear from you.
",
  "datePosted": "2026-04-01",
  "validThrough": "2026-04-23",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",

    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "MULTIPRO CONSUMER PRODUCTS LIMITED"

Customer Relation Management & Retention Manager Job at Multipro Consumer Products Limited




        
    

        
        Multipro Consumer Products Limited is the largest company in Nigeria dealing in Sales, Haulage and Logistics. MCPL was founded in 1996 as a fully owned company of the Tolaram Group. The first product sold by MCPL in 1996 was Indomie and since then it has played a seminal role in making Indomie a household brand in Nigeria. MCPL over the years has grown adding 13 brands in various categories comprising of Noodle, Snacks, Milk, Cereal, Oil, Homecare and Personal Hygiene.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Customer Relation Management & Retention Manager 
Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Role Purpose
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	To drive repeat purchases and long-term customer loyalty through strategic lifecycle marketing, targeted retention campaigns, and well-structured loyalty programs.


Responsibilities


	Plan and execute multi-channel campaigns across email, SMS, and push notifications to engage and retain customers.
	Design and manage loyalty and reward programs that incentivize repeat purchases and deepen brand affinity.
	Segment customers based on behavior, purchase history, and lifecycle stage to deliver targeted and personalized campaigns.
	Track key customer lifecycle metrics, identify drop-off points, and implement strategies to improve retention and engagement.


KPI


	Repeat Purchase Rate
	Customer Lifetime Value (CLV)
	Retention Rate
	CRM-Driven Revenue
	Coupon Redemption Rate


Skills and Competencies:


	Proficiency in CRM platforms and marketing automation tools such as MoEngage, Braze, or HubSpot.
	Strong expertise in customer segmentation and lifecycle marketing strategies.
	Experience with A/B testing and data-driven campaign optimization.
	Analytical mindset with the ability to translate data insights into actionable marketing decisions.


Ideal Background:


	Minimum of 3 years of experience in CRM, lifecycle marketing, or retention marketing.
	Prior experience working with e-commerce or Direct-to-Consumer (D2C) brands.
	If you are passionate about building lasting customer relationships and driving measurable growth through data-led marketing, we would love to hear from you.
    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Operations Officer",
  "description": "First Marina Trust Limited, a financial organisation located in Victoria Island with over 30 years of existence, is recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Operations Officer

Job Location:&nbsp;Victoria Island, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	To ensure correctness and accuracy of posting of transactions
	Timeliness of financial records and financial position of the company
	To ensure the organization is running well with a smooth efficient service that meets the expectations and need of customers


Duties &amp; Responsibilities


	Filing of documents and keeping records
	Updating daily cheque schedule, daily cash summary and representing customer&rsquo;s cheques at the bank accordingly
	Raising vouchers (details of the transaction), and recording of transactions
	Reviewing of cheque register and presenting of daily cheques
	Treating of other department transactions such as issuance of cheques
	Getting documents from files when needed
	Cash dispense of expenditure from all Departments
	Account Opening and Management/ Maintenance
	Daily Postings
	Cash Handling
	Ensure compliance with operation procedure and policy
	Any other duty assigned


Key Performance Indicators


	Achievements on your duties and responsibilities
	Frequency of shortages / surplus
	Number of transactions processed
	Achieving set targets and meeting up deadlines
	Enthusiasm towards work
	Relationship with Clients and Colleagues
	Punctuality


Requirements


	Qualification:&nbsp;BSc in Accounting / Economics
	Years of Experience:&nbsp;2-3 years and above


Job Knowledge:


	Basic Accounting
	Eazy Bank software
	Financial Analysis and operations
	Current policy guidelines by CBN and any other regulatory authority
	Customer service


Skills / Competencies:


	Numeric Skills
	Team Spirit
	Computer appreciation/ Data entry (Microsoft Office)
	Organizations and Coordination Skills.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;recruitment@firstmarinatrust.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Operations Officer Job at First Marina Trust Limited




        
    

        
        First Marina Trust Limited, a financial organisation located in Victoria Island with over 30 years of existence, is recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Operations Officer

Job Location: Victoria Island, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	To ensure correctness and accuracy of posting of transactions
	Timeliness of financial records and financial position of the company
	To ensure the organization is running well with a smooth efficient service that meets the expectations and need of customers


Duties & Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Filing of documents and keeping records
	Updating daily cheque schedule, daily cash summary and representing customer’s cheques at the bank accordingly
	Raising vouchers (details of the transaction), and recording of transactions
	Reviewing of cheque register and presenting of daily cheques
	Treating of other department transactions such as issuance of cheques
	Getting documents from files when needed
	Cash dispense of expenditure from all Departments
	Account Opening and Management/ Maintenance
	Daily Postings
	Cash Handling
	Ensure compliance with operation procedure and policy
	Any other duty assigned


Key Performance Indicators


	Achievements on your duties and responsibilities
	Frequency of shortages / surplus
	Number of transactions processed
	Achieving set targets and meeting up deadlines
	Enthusiasm towards work
	Relationship with Clients and Colleagues
	Punctuality


Requirements


	Qualification: BSc in Accounting / Economics
	Years of Experience: 2-3 years and above


Job Knowledge:


	Basic Accounting
	Eazy Bank software
	Financial Analysis and operations
	Current policy guidelines by CBN and any other regulatory authority
	Customer service


Skills / Competencies:


	Numeric Skills
	Team Spirit
	Computer appreciation/ Data entry (Microsoft Office)
	Organizations and Coordination Skills.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

	Excellent organizational, problem-solving, and decision-making abilities.
	Ability to motivate teams, manage conflicts, and drive performance.
	Proficiency in relevant software and business tools.
	Knowledge of industry-specific regulations and best practices is a plus.


Method of Application&nbsp;

Assistant Manager Job at Mecer Consulting Limited




        
    

        
        Mecer Consulting Limited provides business and management, consulting, general training, etc.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Assistant Manager

Job Location: Abuja (FCT) 
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Assist the manager in planning, coordinating, and overseeing daily operations.
	Supervise and guide team members, providing coaching, mentorship, and performance feedback.
	Support the development and implementation of departmental goals, policies, and procedures.
	Monitor key performance indicators and ensure targets are met.
	Assist in preparing reports, budgets, and strategic plans for management review.
	Foster a positive work environment that promotes teamwork, accountability, and productivity.
	Collaborate with other departments to streamline processes and achieve organizational objectives.
	Handle problem resolution and decision-making in the absence of the manager.
	Deputize for the Manager in their absence
	Assist in the preparation and delivery of presentations


Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree in Business administration, Management and other related courses; Master’s or professional certification is an advantage.
	4–6 years of professional experience, with demonstrated leadership or supervisory roles.
	Strong leadership, interpersonal, and communication skills.
	Excellent organizational, problem-solving, and decision-making abilities.
	Ability to motivate teams, manage conflicts, and drive performance.
	Proficiency in relevant software and business tools.
	Knowledge of industry-specific regulations and best practices is a plus.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send a copy of their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Electrical Engineer",
  "description": "Kennedia Consulting Limited (KCL) -&nbsp;We are a team of professionals with the goal of creating solutions and providing professional business and administrative services while creating value for all our shareholders.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Electrical Engineer
Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	They are seeking a motivated and detail-oriented Electrical/Electronics Engineer who will be responsible for supporting electrical installations, maintenance, and technical operations.
	The ideal candidate should be willing to learn and grow within the organization, as successful candidates will receive on-the-job training.


Key Responsibilities


	Assist in electrical installations and maintenance activities
	Support troubleshooting and repair of electrical systems and equipment
	Ensure compliance with safety and operational standards
	Work collaboratively with the technical team on assigned projects


Requirements


	HND in Electrical/Electronics Engineering (preferred)
	Basic knowledge of electrical systems and components
	Strong willingness to learn and develop technical skills
	Ability to work in a team environment
	Yoruba language proficiency (preferred).


Salary
N200,000 per month.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;Ayomide.lala@kennediaconsulting.net&nbsp;using&nbsp;the Job Position as subject of the mail.",

  },

Electrical Engineer Job at Kennedia Consulting Limited




        
    

        
        Kennedia Consulting Limited (KCL) - We are a team of professionals with the goal of creating solutions and providing professional business and administrative services while creating value for all our shareholders.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Electrical Engineer
Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	They are seeking a motivated and detail-oriented Electrical/Electronics Engineer who will be responsible for supporting electrical installations, maintenance, and technical operations.
	The ideal candidate should be willing to learn and grow within the organization, as successful candidates will receive on-the-job training.


Key Responsibilities


	Assist in electrical installations and maintenance activities
	Support troubleshooting and repair of electrical systems and equipment
	Ensure compliance with safety and operational standards
	Work collaboratively with the technical team on assigned projects


Requirements


	HND in Electrical/Electronics Engineering (preferred)
	Basic knowledge of electrical systems and components
	Strong willingness to learn and develop technical skills
	Ability to work in a team environment
	Yoruba language proficiency (preferred).


Salary
N200,000 per month.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply
